experimental_hooks.guidance: Post thread dissecting did:plc mechanics or comparing AT Protocol to ActivityPub with code snippets.
Post weekly breakdowns of the exact tools used in episodes with pros/cons and ROI data. Example: 'Here’s the stack we used to 3x our Shopify store revenue—here’s what worked and what wasted $2K.'
Launch a 7-day challenge where users commit to liking 100 posts daily, tracking engagement spikes and documenting behavioral shifts in a thread.
